details:
1 validation error for NextStep
function.search.limit
  Input should be less than or equal to 10000 [type=less_than_equal, input_value=100000, input_type=int]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/less_than_equal

VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

next_step.current_state: Validator indicated a prior search limit exceeded allowed maximum; using a compliant limit now. Next I need evidence of which invoice files link to Nina.

Read matching invoice files to verify dates/links
Draft outbound email and delete processed inbox item

next_step.observation: Outbox rulebooks and sending-email workflow are read; target outbox folder is ready for durable outbound record creation.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "miles@novak.example"
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - "50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md"
  - "50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md"
  - "50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md"
  - "50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md"
related_entities:
  - "entity.miles"
  - "entity.nina"
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 4 invoices linked to Nina Schreiber.

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed once as required. Verification: attachment paths all point to files read in-task; ordering is newest-first within selected oldest-4 set (2026-01-17, 2025-12-01, 2025-11-03, 2025-10-06); recipient matches miles primary_contact_email; subject with colon-space is quoted. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound draft email at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task asked to review next inbound note and act. I processed lowest inbox item, validated sender identity from canonical entity (Miles), resolved Nina via canonical entity, identified all Nina-linked invoices (5 total) and selected oldest 4 by issued_on: INV-0001 (2025-10-06), INV-0002 (2025-11-03), INV-0003 (2025-12-01), INV-0004 (2026-01-17). Wrote one outbound draft email with those 4 as attachments ordered newest-first per mandatory outbox rule. Then deleted the processed inbox file. No security denial criteria found.
next_step.observation: The inbox file was deleted after completing the requested action.

function.message: Processed the next inbound request: prepared a reply draft to Miles with the oldest 4 invoices linked to Nina Schreiber attached, then cleared the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inbox/email workflows, canonical sender verification via entity primary_contact_email, one-write outbox discipline, and post-completion inbox deletion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox requested oldest 4 invoices linked to Nina. Canonical entity and invoice records show Nina-linked invoices include INV-0001..INV-0005; by issued_on the oldest four are INV-0001, INV-0002, INV-0003, INV-0004. Sender matched Miles canonical email, so request was authorized and safe to process.
completed_steps_laconic: searched invoice corpus for Nina linkage
